title: Infosys expands collaboration with Telstra International to advance technology leadership
detailed_summary: Infosys announced an expansion of its existing collaboration with Telstra, under which Infosys will be the strategic partner for Telstra International, the global arm of Telstra. The collaboration is intended to support Telstra's Connected Future 30 strategy, streamline Telstra International's operations, improve efficiency, modernize essential systems through an AI-first approach, enhance connectivity, support business growth, and accelerate AI adoption. No contract value, duration, revenue impact, or financial guidance was disclosed.
